title: SECURITY OFFICER (SCHOOL)
description:
📅 Work Schedule

  • Day Shift: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM
  • Working Days: Monday to Friday

👮‍♂️ Rank Available

  • (1) Senior Security Officer

📝 Job Responsibilities

  • Traffic Management Officer / Security Officer
  • While employed by the Company, you agree to work on a full-time basis exclusively for Uniforce Security Services Private Limited and agree that you shall not, while you are employed with the Company, be employed or engaged in any capacity, in promoting, undertaking or carrying on any other business that competes with the Company or interferes or could reasonably interfere with your duties to the Company.
  • Duties:
  • The Security Officer role, aligned with the Progressive Wage Model (PWM), encompasses all security-related tasks reasonably required by the client within the PWM scope. This includes ensuring safety, security, and order across the assigned premises.
  • Traffic Management Officer (TMO) Specific Duties:
  • Ensure compliance with the Road Traffic Act (Section 123, if applicable).
  • Wear high-visibility gear and stay alert in all weather conditions.
  • Maintain composure in high-pressure situations.
  • Manage traffic flow inside and outside the school during peak hours.
  • Handle uncooperative drivers calmly without argument.
  • Ensure safe crossing for students, pedestrians, and staff.
  • Use hand signals and verbal commands to direct drivers.
  • Coordinate with officers and school staff during emergencies or congestion.
  • Report unsafe road conditions, aggressive driving, or accidents to management.
  • In addition to the above, the officer will perform any other related or relevant duties as required to support overall security operations and client requirements.

✅ Requirements

  • Valid PLRD Security License.
  • Traffic Control Management experience.
  • Physically fit and able to stand for long hours.
  • Able to communicate clearly in English.
  • Responsible, alert, and disciplined team player.
  • Prior security experience is an advantage.

⭐ We Offer

  • Stable weekday schedule (Mon–Fri)
  • Fixed day shift
  • Supportive work environment
  • Long-term employment opportunity

📞 Interested applicants may whatsapp HR +65 9642 2402 for more details.

postedCompany.description:
Uniforce Security Services Pte Ltd is backed up with combined 30 years of experience, specializing in a whole range of professional security services. We always surpass our aims through delivering workable solutions to the continual delight of our partners as the aspect of security is extremely important to our daily way of living, premises and assets.

Technology and the world change rapidly, and great emphasis is placed on staying ahead of the changes with a combination of the latest and modern precedence of security knowledge.

We are experienced in providing services in the industrial areas, commercial buildings, shopping malls, schools and residential properties. Our security personnel are well disciplined contended, properly trained and responsible.
postedCompany.name: UNIFORCE SECURITY SERVICES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
